description: Pearl Homeowner App Rebuild - Symptom-based home performance dashboard that helps homeowners understand and improve their lived experience

userStories.title: Initialize React Native project with navigation structure
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a React Native project with bottom tab navigation structure.
acceptanceCriteria: React Native project initialized with Expo
Bottom tab navigation with 4 tabs: Home, My Home, Improve, Account
Basic placeholder screens for each tab

userStories.title: Set up design system: colors, typography, spacing
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a consistent design system for the app.
acceptanceCriteria: Colors defined: Primary (#0B3D5C), Accent (#14B8A6), Helping (#10B981), Hurting (#EF4444), Warning (#F59E0B), backgrounds
Typography scale: H1 (24px), H2 (18px), H3 (16px), Body (14px), Caption (12px)
Spacing system: 4px base unit, Small (8), Medium (16), Large (24), XL (32)

userStories.title: Create reusable Card component
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a reusable Card component for consistent UI.
acceptanceCriteria: Card component with white background, border radius, shadow
Supports onPress prop for tappable cards

userStories.title: Create reusable Button component
userStories.description: As a developer, I need primary and secondary button variants.
acceptanceCriteria: Primary button: teal background, white text

userStories.title: Create Splash screen
userStories.description: As a user, I see a branded splash screen when launching the app.
acceptanceCriteria: Pearl logo centered on dark navy (#0B3D5C) background
Displays for 2 seconds max before navigation

userStories.title: Create Sign Up screen with social auth
userStories.description: As a new user, I can sign up with social auth or email.
acceptanceCriteria: Google and Apple auth buttons prominently displayed
Email and password fields (no confirm password)
Magic link option as text link
Link to login for existing users

userStories.title: Create Login screen
userStories.description: As a returning user, I can log in to my account.
acceptanceCriteria: Link to sign up for new users

userStories.title: Create Address Entry screen
userStories.description: As a new user, I can enter my home address after signing up.
acceptanceCriteria: Address search input field with autocomplete placeholder
We found your home confirmation card showing address

userStories.title: Create Symptom Card component
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a tappable symptom card for the symptom selector.
acceptanceCriteria: Card with icon (left), label (center-left), checkbox (right when selected)
Selected state shows accent border and checkmark

userStories.title: Create Symptom Selection screen
userStories.description: As a new user, I can select what's bothering me about my home.
acceptanceCriteria: Header: What's bothering you about your home?
Grid/list of 8-10 symptom cards with icons
Symptoms: hot/cold rooms, allergies, high bills, drafts, HVAC runs constantly, humidity issues, musty smells, equipment breaking, not sure

userStories.title: Create Pillar Card component
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a pillar card showing status indicator.
acceptanceCriteria: Card with icon, pillar name, status dot
Status colors: green (Good), yellow (Typical), red (Needs Work)
Works in row of 5 or 2-column grid

userStories.title: Create Helping/Hurting Factor Card component
userStories.description: As a developer, I need cards for displaying helping and hurting factors.
acceptanceCriteria: Card with colored left border (green for helping, red for hurting)
Action CTA button on hurting cards

userStories.title: Create Symptom Insights screen
userStories.description: As a user who selected symptoms, I see relevant insights about my home.
acceptanceCriteria: Helping factors section with green cards
Hurting factors section with red cards and CTAs
What you can do section with improvement suggestions

userStories.title: Create Dashboard screen (Home tab)
userStories.description: As a user, I see my personalized dashboard on the Home tab.
acceptanceCriteria: Active symptom card if any logged
Quick actions: Log symptom FAB or card
5 pillar summary as row of pillar cards

userStories.title: Create Score Display component
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a score display with level label.
acceptanceCriteria: Large score number (48px, bold, accent color)

userStories.title: Create My Home screen (Profile tab)
userStories.description: As a user, I can view my home profile with score and pillars.

userStories.title: Create Pillar Detail screen
userStories.description: As a user, I can view detailed information about each pillar.
acceptanceCriteria: Pillar name and icon as header
Helping factors list for this pillar
Hurting factors list for this pillar

userStories.title: Create Equipment List component
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a list component for displaying home equipment.
acceptanceCriteria: List items with equipment name, type icon, lifecycle status indicator
Status indicators: Good (green), Aging (yellow), Replace Soon (red)

userStories.title: Create Equipment Entry screen
userStories.description: As a user, I can add or edit equipment details.
acceptanceCriteria: Equipment type selector at top if adding new
Form fields with smart defaults placeholder
I don't know option for each field

userStories.title: Create Rebate Card component
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a rebate card showing savings amount.
acceptanceCriteria: Card with equipment icon (not stock photo)

userStories.title: Create Improve screen (Improve tab)
userStories.description: As a user, I can browse rebates and improvement paths.
acceptanceCriteria: Recommended for you section with rebate cards
Total potential savings summary at top

userStories.title: Create Rebate Detail screen
userStories.description: As a user, I can view full rebate details and how to claim.

userStories.title: Create Maintenance Reminder Card component
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a maintenance reminder card with status.
acceptanceCriteria: Card with item name, due date, status badge
Status colors: Overdue (red), Due Soon (yellow), Upcoming (gray), Completed (green)

userStories.title: Create Maintenance List screen
userStories.description: As a user, I can view and manage maintenance reminders.
acceptanceCriteria: Section headers: Overdue, Due Soon, Upcoming
Empty state with suggestion to use default schedule

userStories.title: Create Badge component
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a badge display component.
acceptanceCriteria: In Progress state: outline with progress indicator

userStories.title: Create Badges section for My Home screen
userStories.description: As a user, I can see badges my home has earned.
acceptanceCriteria: Horizontal scrollable row of badge components
Earned badges shown first with full color
In-progress badges shown as paths with progress

userStories.title: Create Certification Progress component
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a component showing certification tier progress.
acceptanceCriteria: Progress bar showing points toward next tier
Tiers: Silver (500+), Gold (625+), Platinum (750+), Platinum Plus (875+)
Points needed to next tier shown

userStories.title: Create Account screen (Account tab)
userStories.description: As a user, I can access settings and account functions.

userStories.title: Create Documents screen
userStories.description: As a user, I can view my certification and uploaded documents.
acceptanceCriteria: Three sections: Your Certification, Your Uploads, Tax Documents
Document list items with icon, name, preview action
Upload button in Your Uploads section
Tax Documents only visible during tax season (Jan-Apr) or hidden

userStories.title: Create Upgrade Prompt component
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a contextual upgrade prompt for paid features.
acceptanceCriteria: Not shown proactively, only when user taps paid feature

userStories.title: Create Symptom Log action flow
userStories.description: As a returning user, I can log a new symptom from the dashboard.
acceptanceCriteria: FAB or prominent card on dashboard
After selection shows specific symptom options

userStories.title: Create Alert Card component for dashboard
userStories.description: As a developer, I need alert cards for maintenance, equipment, and rebates.
acceptanceCriteria: Compact card with icon, title, brief description
Tappable to navigate to relevant detail

userStories.title: Create Improvement Path component
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a component showing sequenced improvement steps.
acceptanceCriteria: Each step shows: action, estimated cost, impact indicator
Steps link to rebates or Pearl Pros when relevant

userStories.title: Create Pearl Pro Card component
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a contractor card for Pearl Recognized Professionals.
acceptanceCriteria: Card with business name, specialty, contact info
Work history on this home (if any)

userStories.title: Create Pearl Pros directory screen
userStories.description: As a user, I can find Pearl Recognized Professionals in my area.
acceptanceCriteria: Filter by specialty (HVAC, insulation, solar, etc.)
Empty state if none in area

userStories.title: Wire up onboarding flow navigation
userStories.description: As a user, I experience smooth onboarding from splash to dashboard.
acceptanceCriteria: Splash -> Sign Up (if new) or Login (if returning)
Sign Up -> Address Entry -> Symptom Selection -> Insights -> Dashboard

userStories.title: Add skeleton loading states to major screens
userStories.description: As a user, I see skeleton loaders instead of spinners while content loads.
acceptanceCriteria: Dashboard shows skeleton cards while loading
My Home shows skeleton score and pillar cards

userStories.title: Add empty states to lists
userStories.description: As a user, I see helpful empty states when lists have no content.
acceptanceCriteria: Equipment list: No equipment added with Add prompt
Maintenance list: No reminders with Use suggested schedule option
Rebates: No rebates found with Check back suggestion
Symptoms logged: No symptoms with Log your first prompt

userStories.title: Add error states to screens
userStories.description: As a user, I see clear error messages with retry options when things fail.
acceptanceCriteria: Generic error component: message + Retry button
Applied to Dashboard, My Home, Improve, Maintenance

userStories.title: Add score change animation
userStories.description: As a user, I see my score animate when it changes after adding equipment.
acceptanceCriteria: Count-up animation from old to new score (500ms)
